Postaviti MVC strukturu projekta u Lab1 i definirati osnovne foldere za model, podatke, servise i kontrolere. Ovo je osnova za sve daljnje korake i blokira ostatak plana.\n2. Osmisliti domenski model za knjige i ocjene tako da ima najmanje 7 klasa. Predlo+┐eni skup: Book, Author, User, Review, Genre, Publisher i BookGenre kao povezna klasa za N-N vezu. Model mora uklju”Åiti barem jedan enum i barem jedno DateTime svojstvo.\n3. Odrediti koje klase ”ńe biti kompleksne i dati im smislena svojstva. Cilj je da najmanje 4 klase imaju vi+Ēe od 5 svojstava, primjerice Book, User, Review i Author.\n4. Definirati odnose me”┼u klasama: Author 1-N Book, User 1-N Review, Book 1-N Review, Book N-N Genre preko BookGenre. Time se pokrivaju tra+┐ene veze i izbjegava se umjetno modeliranje.\n5. Napraviti in-memory spremi+Ēte ili servis koji ”ńe inicijalizirati podatke. Treba odmah kreirati barem 3 glavna objekta i razgranati ih s povezanim entitetima, primjerice 3 knjige, vi+Ēe autora i vi+Ēe ocjena po knjizi.\n6. Implementirati MVC controller i view modele za prikaz stranice. Glavna stranica treba prikazati listu knjiga, prosje”Ånu ocjenu, broj recenzija i dodatne informacije iz modela.\n7. Uvesti smislen LINQ sloj za upite nad modelom. Treba imati upite za filtriranje, sortiranje, izra”Åun prosjeka, pronalazak najvi+Ēe ocijenjenih knjiga i rad s podupitima ili grupiranjem.\n8. Dodati async-await demonstraciju kroz servisne metode i asinhroni action u kontroleru. To mo+┐e biti simulirano s Task-based metodama nad in-memory podacima kako bi se pokazalo razumijevanje obrasca bez baze.\n9. Provjeriti da je kod ”Åitljiv i da su imena klasa, svojstava i metoda konzistentna s C# konvencijama. Fokus je na smislenom objektom modelu i stabilnom prikazu podataka, ne na dodatnoj arhitekturi koja nije tra+┐ena.\n10. Nakon implementacije, testirati ru”Åno klju”Åne prikaze i LINQ rezultate te provjeriti da se async putanja izvr+Ēava bez blokiranja UI toka.\n\n**Relevant files**\n- `Lab1/` įŪ÷ mjesto za cijelu aplikaciju i sve nove projektne datoteke\n- `Lab1/Controllers/*` įŪ÷ MVC kontroler za stranicu knjiga i ocjena\n- `Lab1/Models/*` įŪ÷ domenske klase, enum i povezne klase\n- `Lab1/Services/*` įŪ÷ in-memory podaci, LINQ upiti i async metode\n- `Lab1/Views/*` įŪ÷ prikaz knjiga, detalja i ocjena\n- `Lab1/Program.cs` įŪ÷ registracija servisa i MVC pipeline\n- `readme.md` įŪ÷ kratka bilje+Ēka o temi ako je potrebno\n\n**Verification**\n1. Pokrenuti aplikaciju i provjeriti da se po”Åetna stranica u”Åitava bez gre+Ēaka.\n2. Provjeriti da se na stranici vide barem 3 glavne knjige i povezani podaci.\n3. Ru”Åno potvrditi da LINQ rezultati prikazuju filtriranje, sortiranje i prosjeke kako je planirano.\n4. Provjeriti da se async action izvr+Ēava i vra”ńa isti sadr+┐aj kao sinkroni put, bez blokiranja.\n5. Ako se kasnije uvede baza, tek tada dodati dodatnu provjeru migracija; za sada to nije u opsegu.\n\n**Decisions**\n- Odabrana je MVC aplikacija.\n- Podaci ”ńe biti in-memory, bez baze, jer je to dovoljno za laboratorij i br+┐e je za izradu.\n- Fokus je na demonstraciji zahtjeva iz lab-a, ne na punom production-ready sustavu.\n\n**Further Considerations**\n1. Ako +┐eli+Ē, kasnije mo+┐emo pro+Ēiriti model prema stvarnom projektu s bazom, ali to nije potrebno za ovu vje+┐bu.\n2. public int TotalAuthors { get; set; }\n+\n+    public int TotalUsers { get; set; }\n+\n+    public double OverallAverageRating { get; set; }\n+\n+    public List<BookCardViewModel> TopBooks { get; set; } = new();\n+\n+    public List<ReviewCardViewModel> RecentReviews { get; set; } = new();\n+\n+    public List<GenreStatViewModel> GenreStats { get; set; } = new();\n+}\n*** Add File: /c:/Users/Mihael/Desktop/ASP.NET/Lab1/Services/IBookCatalogService.cs\n+using Lab1.ViewModels;\n+\n+namespace Lab1.Services;\n+\n+public interface IBookCatalogService\n+{\n+    Task<BookDashboardViewModel> GetDashboardAsync();\n+}\n*** Add File: /c:/Users/Mihael/Desktop/ASP.NET/Lab1/Services/BookCatalogService.cs\n+using Lab1.Models;\n+using Lab1.ViewModels;\n+\n+namespace Lab1.Services;\n+\n+public class BookCatalogService : IBookCatalogService\n+{\n+    private readonly List<Author> _authors;\n+    private readonly List<Publisher> _publishers;\n+    private readonly List<Genre> _genres;\n+    private readonly List<User> _users;\n+    private readonly List<Book> _books;\n+    private readonly List<BookGenre> _bookGenres;\n+    private readonly List<Review> _reviews;\n+\n+    public BookCatalogService()\n+    {\n+        (_authors, _publishers, _genres, _users, _books, _bookGenres, _reviews) = SeedData();\n+    }\n+\n+    public async Task<BookDashboardViewModel> GetDashboardAsync()\n+    {\n+        await Task.Delay(120);\n+\n+        var topBooks = _books\n+            .Select(BuildBookCard)\n+            .OrderByDescending(book => book.AverageRating)\n+            .ThenByDescending(book => book.ReviewCount)\n+            .ToList();\n+\n+        var recentReviews = _reviews\n+            .OrderByDescending(review => review.ReviewedAt)\n+            .Take(5)\n+            .Select(review => new ReviewCardViewModel\n+            {\n+                BookTitle = review.Book.Title,\n+                ReviewerName = review.User.FullName,\n+                Score = review.Score,\n+                Sentiment = review.Sentiment,\n+                Comment = review.Comment,\n+                ReviewedAt = review.ReviewedAt\n+            })\n+            .ToList();\n+\n+        var genreStats = _genres\n+            .Select(genre => new GenreStatViewModel\n+            {\n+                GenreName = genre.Name,\n+                BookCount = _bookGenres.Count(bookGenre => bookGenre.GenreId == genre.Id),\n+                AverageRating = CalculateGenreAverageRating(genre.Id)\n+            })\n+            .OrderByDescending(stat => stat.AverageRating)\n+            .ThenByDescending(stat => stat.BookCount)\n+            .ToList();\n+\n+        return new BookDashboardViewModel\n+        {\n+            TotalBooks = _books.Count,\n+            TotalAuthors = _authors.Count,\n+            TotalUsers = _users.Count,\n+            OverallAverageRating = CalculateOverallAverageRating(),\n+            TopBooks = topBooks.Take(3).ToList(),\n+            RecentReviews = recentReviews,\n+            GenreStats = genreStats\n+        };\n+    }\n+\n+    private BookCardViewModel BuildBookCard(Book book)\n+    {\n+        var relatedReviews = _reviews.Where(review => review.BookId == book.Id).ToList();\n+        var averageRating = relatedReviews.Count == 0 ? 0 : relatedReviews.Average(review => review.Score);\n+\n+        return new BookCardViewModel\n+        {\n+            Id = book.Id,\n+            Title = book.Title,\n+            AuthorName = $\"{book.Author.FirstName} {book.Author.LastName}\",\n+            PublisherName = book.Publisher.Name,\n+            Genres = string.Join(\", \", book.BookGenres.Select(bookGenre => bookGenre.Genre.Name)),\n+            Status = book.Status,\n+            PublishedOn = book.PublishedOn,\n+            AverageRating = averageRating,\n+            ReviewCount = relatedReviews.Count\n+        };\n+    }\n+\n+    private double CalculateOverallAverageRating()\n+    {\n+        return _reviews.Count == 0 ? 0 : _reviews.Average(review => review.Score);\n+    }\n+\n+    private double CalculateGenreAverageRating(int genreId)\n+    {\n+        var genreBooks = _bookGenres\n+            .Where(bookGenre => bookGenre.GenreId == genreId)\n+            .Select(bookGenre => bookGenre.BookId)\n+            .Distinct()\n+            .ToList();\n+\n+        var genreRatings = _reviews.Where(review => genreBooks.Contains(review.BookId)).ToList();\n+\n+        return genreRatings.Count == 0 ? 0 : genreRatings.Average(review => review.Score);\n+    }\n+\n+    private static (\n+        List<Author> authors,\n+        List<Publisher> publishers,\n+        List<Genre> genres,\n+        List<User> users,\n+        List<Book> Faza 1 - UX agent i dokaz (blokira UI finalizaciju)\n2. Definirati i commitati UX custom-agent instruction file u repozitorij te dogovoriti stil (tipografija, layout principi, komponente, navigacija, responsivnost).\n3. U glavnom agent workflowu osigurati poziv UX sub-agenta za UI code generation i potvrditi da je poziv vidljiv u logu.\n4. Provjeriti da log zapisi ostaju u repozitoriju kao dokaz poziva (bez osjetljivih podataka).\n5. Faza 2 - Podatkovni sloj s mock repositoryjima (blokira controllere)\n6. Refaktorirati postoje”ńi servis u jasniji repository-style sloj po entitetima (Book, Author, Genre, Publisher, Review, User) ili pro+Ēiriti trenutni servis API tako da podr+┐ava GetAll/GetById po svakom entitetu.\n7. Registrirati sve potrebne repository/service ovisnosti u Program.cs kroz dependency injection.\n8. Osigurati da svi repositoryji koriste stati”Åke in-memory podatke iz postoje”ńeg modela i seed relacija.\n9. Faza 3 - MVC endpointi za sve tra+┐ene stranice (blokira navigaciju)\n10. Dodati controllere i akcije Index + Details za svaki entitet; bez Create/Edit flowa osim ako se kasnije eksplicitno doda kao plus.\n11. Uvesti view modele po ekranu gdje je potreban agregirani prikaz (npr. detalji knjige + recenzije + povezani podaci).\n12. Uskladiti routing konvencije s MVC pravilima (controller/action/id).\n13. Faza 4 - Navigacija i custom stranica (ovisno o Fazi 3)\n14. Pro+Ēiriti layout navigaciju: ulazi za sve entitete i jasna hijerarhija stranica.\n15. Na svim Index listama dodati linkove na Details.\n16. Dodati breadcrumbs na list/detail ekranima radi pune navigacije.\n17. Implementirati jednu specifi”Ånu custom stranicu (npr. įŪØRating ArenaįŪŻ landing s top knjigama, sentiment raspodjelom i CTA linkovima prema entitetima).\n18. Faza 5 - Unique UX polish (paralelno s kasnijim dijelom Faze 4)\n19. Primijeniti UX sub-agent prijedloge: non-standard vizualni smjer, konzistentan dizajn sustav, ”Åitljivost i mobilna prilagodba.\n20. Provjeriti kontraste, stanja linkova i preglednost tabela/kartica na manjim ekranima.\n21. Faza 6 - Validacija i predaja\n22. Pokrenuti build i ru”Åni smoke test svih ruta (svaki entitet: Index + Details, te custom stranica).\n23. Potvrditi da nema mrtvih linkova, da breadcrumbovi rade i da se podaci mapiraju iz mock repozitorija.\n24. 1, 26, 9, 0, 0),\n                IsRecommended = false,\n                Sentiment = ReviewSentiment.Neutral,\n                BookId = 2,\n                UserId = 3\n            }\n        };\n\n        foreach (var review in reviews)\n        {\n            review.Book = books.Single(book => book.Id == review.BookId);\n            review.User = users.Single(user => user.Id == review.UserId);\n            review.Book.Reviews.Add(review);\n            review.User.Reviews.Add(review);\n        }\n\n        return (authors, publishers, genres, users, books, bookGenres, reviews);\n Lab2.Models;\nusing Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;\n\nnamespace Lab2.Data;\n\npublic class CatalogDbContext : DbContext\n{\n    public CatalogDbContext(DbContextOptions<CatalogDbContext> options)\n        : base(options)\n    {\n    }\n\n    public DbSet<Author> Authors => Set<Author>();\n\n    public DbSet<Publisher> Publishers => Set<Publisher>();\n\n    public DbSet<Genre> Genres => Set<Genre>();\n\n    public DbSet<User> Users => Set<User>();\n\n    public DbSet<Book> Books => Set<Book>();\n\n    public DbSet<BookGenre> BookGenres => Set<BookGenre>();\n\n    public DbSet<Review> Reviews => Set<Review>();\n\n    protected override void OnModelCreating(ModelBuilder modelBuilder)\n    {\n        base.OnModelCreating(modelBuilder);\n\n        modelBuilder.Entity<BookGenre>()\n            .HasKey(bookGenre => new { bookGenre.BookId, bookGenre.GenreId });\n\n        modelBuilder.Entity<Book>()\n            .HasOne(book => book.Author)\n            .WithMany(author => author.Books)\n            .HasForeignKey(book => book.AuthorId);\n\n        modelBuilder.Entity<Book>()\n            .HasOne(book => book.Publisher)\n            .WithMany(publisher => publisher.Books)\n            .HasForeignKey(book => book.PublisherId);\n\n        modelBuilder.Entity<BookGenre>()\n            .HasOne(bookGenre => bookGenre.Book)\n            .WithMany(book => book.BookGenres)\n            .HasForeignKey(bookGenre => bookGenre.BookId);\n\n        modelBuilder.Entity<BookGenre>()\n            .HasOne(bookGenre => bookGenre.Genre)\n            .WithMany(genre => genre.BookGenres)\n            .HasForeignKey(bookGenre => bookGenre.GenreId);\n\n        modelBuilder.Entity<Review>()\n            .HasOne(review => review.Book)\n            .WithMany(book => book.Reviews)\n            .HasForeignKey(review => review.BookId);\n\n        modelBuilder.Entity<Review>()\n            .HasOne(review => review.User)\n            .WithMany(user => user.Reviews)\n            .HasForeignKey(review => review.UserId);\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"call_gTI5IpQY99CSYApnhiVpgueU__vscode-1776333310350","cwd":"c:\\Users\\Mihael\\Desktop\\ASP.NET"}

\"s0\".\"JoinedAt\", \"s0\".\"ReputationPoints\", \"s0\".\"Username\"\n      FROM \"Books\" AS \"b\"\n      INNER JOIN \"Authors\" AS \"a\" ON \"b\".\"AuthorId\" = \"a\".\"Id\"\n      INNER JOIN \"Publishers\" AS \"p\" ON \"b\".\"PublisherId\" = \"p\".\"Id\"\n      LEFT JOIN (\n          SELECT \"b0\".\"BookId\", \"b0\".\"GenreId\", \"b0\".\"AddedAt\", \"g\".\"Id\", \"g\".\"Audience\", \"g\".\"Description\", \"g\".\"Name\"\n          FROM \"BookGenres\" AS \"b0\"\n          INNER JOIN \"Genres\" AS \"g\" ON \"b0\".\"GenreId\" = \"g\".\"Id\"\n      ) AS \"s\" ON \"b\".\"Id\" = \"s\".\"BookId\"\n      LEFT JOIN (\n          SELECT \"r\".\"Id\", \"r\".\"BookId\", \"r\".\"Comment\", \"r\".\"IsRecommended\", \"r\".\"ReviewedAt\", \"r\".\"Score\", \"r\".\"Sentiment\", \"r\".\"Title\", \"r\".\"UserId\", \"u\".\"Id\" AS \"Id0\", \"u\".\"Email\", \"u\".\"FavoriteGenre\", \"u\".\"FullName\", \"u\".\"IsPremiumMember\", \"u\".\"JoinedAt\", \"u\".\"ReputationPoints\", \"u\".\"Username\"\n          FROM \"Reviews\" AS \"r\"\n          INNER JOIN \"Users\" AS \"u\" ON \"r\".\"UserId\" = \"u\".\"Id\"\n      ) AS \"s0\" ON \"b\".\"Id\" = \"s0\".\"BookId\"\n      ORDER BY \"b\".\"Title\", \"b\".\"Id\", \"a\".\"Id\", \"p\".\"Id\", \"s\".\"BookId\", \"s\".\"GenreId\", \"s\".\"Id\", \"s0\".\"Id\"\ninfo: Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Database.Command[20101]\n Book\n@{\n    ViewData[\"Title\"] = \"Detalji knjige\";\n    var average = Model.Reviews.Count == 0 ? 0 : Model.Reviews.Average(review => review.Score);\n    var genres = Model.BookGenres.Count == 0\n
